case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS HERNANDEZ, VICTOR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,778.12 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, VICTOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
